rent.note: furnished 1BR in Roma Norte / Condesa nomad belt; budget end $600, prime $1,200+

groceries.note: home cooking, mix of markets and supermarkets

diningOut.note: tacos, fondas, corridas + occasional mid-range restaurant

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; strong coworking scene in Roma/Condesa

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.claim: overall monthly budget $1,600–$2,400 for comfortable nomad lifestyle in 2026
evidence.quote: The average digital nomad spends about $1,600–$2,400 per month living comfortably in Mexico City in 2026
Rent for a modern one-bedroom apartment in a prime area like Roma Norte typically ranges between $1,100 and $1,500. For more budget-conscious options, rent typically ranges from $600-$1,200 monthly

evidence.claim: utilities and internet average $45 for single person
evidence.quote: Utilities and internet are generally inexpensive, with the average bill for a single person hovering around $45

evidence.claim: street food + fondas $8/day; tacos ubiquitous value
evidence.quote: You can eat extraordinarily well for $8/day at taco stands, market fondas, and corridas
